mapper.select:
select id, name, code, description, status, create_time, update_time from permission
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and code like concat('%', #{code}, '%')
and description like concat('%', #{description}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc

select code from permission where id in
#{id}
select DISTINCT p.code from permission p inner join role_permission rp ON p.id=rp.permission_id inner join employee_role er ON rp.role_id=er.role_id where er.employee_id=#{employeeId} and p.status=1
